response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff Software Engineer with 18+ years of production experience across diverse technology stacks—drastically overqualified for a junior/mid-level individual contributor role. While he possesses mastery of all required technologies (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS), this represents a significant seniority mismatch that would result in misaligned expectations, rapid disengagement, and likely attrition within months. The role seeks someone in an active growth phase; Bogdan is established at a senior leadership level.
strengths: Exceptional full-stack depth across backend, frontend, DevOps, and infrastructure—proven expertise in TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, Kubernetes, and clean architecture
18+ years of demonstrated software craftsmanship, TDD advocacy, and ability to ship production systems across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded domains
Track record of rapid technology adoption and mentorship—organized workshops, contributed to open-source infrastructure (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and taught others
concerns: Significantly overqualified as a Staff engineer for a junior/mid-level IC role—will quickly outgrow scope, responsibilities, and learning opportunities
Current role at re:cinq is recent (13 months tenure); placement in another junior-focused IC role signals misalignment with career expectations and retention risk
Location mismatch: currently based in Bangalore, but role requires high on-site presence in Germany; previous Berlin roles are 2+ years old with no current relocation signal

key_factors.factor: Seniority level mismatch (Staff vs. Junior/Mid IC)
